zh.{Blddn ap Cnfn}: 義大利馬阿斯可利 派諾
zh.Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Wales: 威爾士梅利奧爾利安法可利斯
zh.Llanbister, Radnorshire, Wales: 威爾士拉德諾斯爾利安別斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd於1349年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾利安法可利斯時，她的父親Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan25歲，母親Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill20歲。她和Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd至少有2個女兒。

zh-hans.{Blddn ap Cnfn}: 意大利馬阿斯可利 派諾
zh-hans.Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Wales: 威尔士梅利奧爾利安法可利斯
zh-hans.Llanbister, Radnorshire, Wales: 威尔士拉德諾斯爾利安別斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd于1349年出生在威尔士梅利奧爾利安法可利斯时，她的父亲Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan25岁，母亲Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill20岁。她和Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd至少有2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gwenhwyfer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ + hwyfar ‘smooth, soft’. See also Jennifer , Guinevere .

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd was born in 1349, in Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Wales, her father, Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan, was 25 and her mother, Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill, was 20. She had at least 2 daughters with Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd est née en 1349, à Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd 1349 in Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan 25 und ihre Mutter Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill 20. Sie hatte mit Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd mindestens 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd è nata il nel 1349 nel Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Galles, sua padre, Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd.

ja.{Blddn ap Cnfn}: イタリアマルチェアスコリ ピセノ
ja.Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Wales: ウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアランファチレス
ja.Llanbister, Radnorshire, Wales: ウェールズラドノーシュアイアランビスター
ja.Anglesey, Wales: ウェールズアングレセイ
ja.lifeSummary: Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwydが1349年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアランファチレスで生まれた時，父Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychanは25歳，母Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhillは20歳であった。彼女はIeuan Llwyd ap Gruffyddとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd(이)가 1349년 웨일스 머이오네스실르 랜팩h레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd nasceu em 1349, em Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Gales, seu pai, Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd родилась в 1349 г. в местности лланфачрет, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenhwyfer verch Meurig Llwyd nació en 1349, en Llanfachreth, Merionethshire, Gales, su papá, Meurig Llwyd Meurig Vychan, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mallt ferch Hywel Pickhill, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Ieuan Llwyd ap Gruffydd.
